{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603220340286084BBF46B1CE762B734\"}"},"total":2001},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7313823166681105164","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在这部小说中，作者通过精彩的情节和生动的描写，展现了一个充满挑战和机遇的世界。少年在面对困境时，始终保持着坚定的信念和勇气，令人动容。读者们可以跟随主人公的经历，感受他的成长和觉醒，同时也能在字里行间领略到作者对于人性和命运的深刻思考。\n总的来说，这是一部值得一读的小说，它不仅能够带给读者们精彩的阅读体验，还能够引发对于人生的思考。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1702883460,"group_id":"7260075634972429373","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"二十年老书虫请求出战","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4yEedFoM7nUtZ+dyFMAPV8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/92f9bb5f929944b492132362b16bf5fe~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776710029\u0026x-signature=9sMj7SFLkx50Qg1xYO%2BnWQeXvO4%3D","user_id":"92365426847","user_name":"作者eb7y58"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"92365426847","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7260075634972429373","book_info":{"abstract":"新作品出炉,大家可以前往番茄小说阅读我的作品哦,希望大家能够喜欢,你们的关注是我写作的动力,我会努力讲好每个故事!","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-st 超好看，很多书看了前面一些，要么故事太垃圾，拖拉，或者就是节奏太快，故事情节设计、人物刻化不到位，都是看了一半扔掉不看了。\n我现在正在追更的书不多，此书是其一。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722653573,"group_id":"7260075634972429373","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3SjhzTDcleMJ/j5IZKWnFM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"92760983070","user_name":"喜欢青龙犬的祁少"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"92760983070","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7260075634972429373","book_info":{"abstract":"新作品出炉,大家可以前往番茄小说阅读我的作品哦,希望大家能够喜欢,你们的关注是我写作的动力,我会努力讲好每个故事!","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f5533e68b70bcd4807682c56ca94a414","author":"卸甲老卒","author_id":"","book_id":"7260075634972429373","book_name":"琅琊庶子","book_short_name":"天官到","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":258,\"name\":\"传统玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258\u0026name=传统玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":452,\"name\":\"架空\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452\u0026name=架空\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7260076055170712098","read_count":"43201","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2413560"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1075","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,架空","thumb_u
